title: Education and learning
explanation:
Education and learning

  • study words: assignment, revision, scholarship, attendance, qualification
  • verbs: revise, memorise, concentrate, submit
  • phrases: take notes, hand in work

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I need to finish this history ____ by tomorrow. | *assignment | recovery | documentary
She won a ____ to study abroad. | *scholarship | promotion | symptom
Good ____ is important if you want to understand lectures. | *concentration | evidence | crime
Please ____ your essay before midnight. | *submit | stream | sentence

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: I usually ____ my notes before an exam. | revise
The university checks student ____ every week. | attendance
He wrote down key ideas so he could ____ notes later. | review
This course gives you a recognised ____. | qualification
It is easier to learn when you actively ____ with the material. | engage

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Some students try to ____ whole paragraphs word for word. | *memorise | delay | resign
The professor gave an interesting ____ on climate policy. | *lecture | attendance | signal
You should ____ your homework on time. | *hand in | set off | grow up
questions.feedback: Hand in = give to the teacher.

questions.text: I cannot ____ when the room is noisy. | *concentrate | broadcast | decorate
